mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rsku_supply ( rsku_id, rspu_id, variant_id, factory_code, factory_sku, factory_price, price_band, product_level, material_code, material_description, lead_time_days, moq, warranty_years, shipping_from, diff_notes, quote_confidence, review_status, price_updated, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.rskuId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.variantId}, #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.factorySku}, #{item.factoryPrice}, #{item.priceBand}, #{item.productLevel}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialDescription}, #{item.leadTimeDays}, #{item.moq}, #{item.warrantyYears}, #{item.shippingFrom}, #{item.diffNotes}, #{item.quoteConfidence}, #{item.reviewStatus}, #{item.priceUpdated}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
